mapper.insert: insert into article(title, content, cover_img, category_id, create_user, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title},#{content},#{coverImg},#{categoryId},#{createUser},#{createTime},#{updateTime})
insert into category(category_name, category_alias, create_user, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryName},#{categoryAlias},#{createUser},#{createTime},#{updateTime})
